  "sources": "Input data comes from pointer events (pointerdown, pointermove, etc.) on the canvas element; external props such as backgroundColor, penColor, strokeOptions, and data URLs for images.",
  "sinks": "Data URLs generated by toDataURL method, which can export the canvas image; potential untrusted data input via fromDataURL; rendering to the DOM in the component's template.",
  "flows": "Pointer events flow into input points array, which then gets rendered onto the canvas; image data URLs flow into Image.onload to draw images; exported data URL from canvas uses toDataURL.",

  "analysis": "The code defines a signature capture component with functions for handling pointer input, canvas resizing, color setting, and data import/export. The component's methods and data flows are typical for such functionality. No anomalies or malicious patterns are observed. External dependencies are standard Vue.js libraries and getStroke, which is used for drawing paths. The code is well-structured and appears safe.",
